instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: An integer overflow vulnerability in Exif.cpp::jpeg_read_exif_dir in FreeImage 3.18.0 allows attackers to obtain information and cause a denial of service.
output: An integer overflow vulnerability in the Exif.cpp::jpeg_read_exif_dir function of FreeImage version 3.18.0 can be exploited by attackers to access sensitive information and disrupt service availability.
